title: Pass 5.E.4: ferrotorch-optim string-keyed state HashMap<String, _> → typed key
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-optim audit, ARCH_SMELL.

11/14 optimizers regenerate `format!("g{group_idx}_p{param_idx}")` inside hot inner loops to key per-param HashMap<String, _> state (56 param_key callsites across src/). String-keyed state at this granularity is also fragile under param-group reordering.

Acceptance:
- Define a typed ParamKey { group: u32, param: u32 } (Copy + Hash + Eq) in optimizer.rs
- Migrate 11 optimizers to HashMap<ParamKey, _>
- Eliminates per-step format! allocation (PERF_OBVIOUS adjacent — see #1118)
- No public API change; serialization compat needs care if state_dict round-trips through string keys.
